title: meringium secundum
side_effects: Meringium secundum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and vision impairment. In severe cases, improper use of the meringium secundum plant can cause respiratory issues, allergic reactions, and even organ damage. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health-related purposes.
